candidate_definition_hints.text: Semantic, self-describing binary format for Linked Data

CBOR-LD is a **self-describing** binary format that encodes Linked Data expressed in JSON-LD into a compact form. Its primary purpose is to compress the verbose textual representation of JSON-LD into just a few bytes; small enough to embed in a QR code, barcode, or any other con…
